metadata.description: Source Cloud Object Storage configuration. Must include: bucket_name (name of the source bucket), aws_access_key (HMAC access key ID), aws_secret_access_key (HMAC secret access key), endpoint_url (S3-compatible endpoint, e.g. https://s3.eu-de.cloud-object-storage.appdomain.cloud)

Target Cloud Object Storage configuration. Must include: bucket_name (name of the target bucket), aws_access_key (HMAC access key ID), aws_secret_access_key (HMAC secret access key), endpoint_url (S3-compatible endpoint, e.g. https://s3.eu-de.cloud-object-storage.appdomain.cloud)
Keys of objects in the source COS bucket to transfer. If empty or omitted, all objects in the source bucket (optionally filtered by source_prefix) will be transferred.
Optional prefix to prepend to source object keys
Optional prefix to prepend to target object keys
